rule_text: REVISED ESTIMATE must be submitted for an AP work when the sanctioned estimate is likely to be exceeded by MORE THAN 5% (for any cause whatsoever) OR when material developments necessitate revised administrative approval; report must show progress + reasons for revision; sanctioned estimate must accompany the revision.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimateExceedance>5
verification_method: If actual exceeds sanctioned >5%: revised estimate on file; reject post-hoc completion-report excuses unless construction stage was advanced

rule_text: Approval/sanction to an AP works estimate (other than ordinary annual repairs) CEASES to be in force FIVE YEARS after the date of approval, unless the work has already been STARTED; sanctions for ordinary annual repairs lapse on the last day of the financial year (with special working-year-end dates for irrigation works in certain divisions).
verification_method: Check sanction-order date < 5 years from work-start; reject expired sanctions for unstarted works
